stemHtml: For humanitarian operations on a light aircraft, you are transporting 13 kg food parcels. They are stored in the cargo bay with a CG of 7.8 m aft of the datum line. Before loading the cargo, the total mass of the aircraft is 7290 kg and its CG is 5.62 m aft of the datum line. To be within the aft CG limit of 5.7 m, what is the maximum number of food parcels you can load today?
